subcodes.first_line: O godly Sína, and O kindred of two brilliant candles! In this mighty Cycle—wherein the bright morn and the radiant dawn have illumined the whole world
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سینای الهی و ای منتسبین دو شمع نورانی در این کور عظیم که صبح
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
